title: Software Engineering Intern
description: Build and maintain full-stack applications. Work with agile teams on financial technology products.

title: Data Analyst Intern
description: Analyze financial datasets, build dashboards, and support data-driven decision making.

title: Research Assistant - Neuroscience Lab
description: Assist with fMRI studies and data collection for cognitive neuroscience research.

title: Economic Policy Intern
description: Support economic research and policy analysis. Assist with data visualization and report writing.

title: Campus Tour Guide
description: Lead prospective student and family tours. Share your BC experience.

title: Machine Learning Research Intern
description: Apply ML techniques to defense and humanitarian problems. Strong math background required.

title: Pre-Law Society President
description: Lead the Pre-Law Society. Organize mock trials, speaker events, and LSAT prep sessions.

title: Teaching Assistant - Intro Biology
description: Assist with lab sections, hold office hours, and grade assignments for BIOL 1300.

title: Investment Banking Summer Analyst
description: Quantitative analysis, financial modeling, and client presentations in the investment banking division.

title: Clinical Research Coordinator
description: Coordinate clinical trials, manage patient data, and support principal investigators.

title: CS Teaching Assistant
description: Hold office hours, lead lab sections, and assist students in CSCI 1101 or 1102.

title: Quantitative Researcher Intern
description: Apply mathematical and statistical models to financial markets. Python and ML experience preferred.
